impact: This advances the PP&D source monitoring plan by proving changed requirements retain stable IDs, preserve before/after public source evidence, require review, and fail closed for agent impact summaries before any live crawl or automation is introduced.
summary: Add fixture-only validation for changed source-diff requirements.
target_task: Task checkbox-98: Task checkbox-93: Add validation for source-diff fixtures proving changed requirements preserve prior and current source evidence, stable requirement IDs, review-needed flags, and fail-closed agent impact summaries.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
